ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "scan_number" INTEGER /* Scan number of the shot */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the shot */,
  "x" REAL /* x-coordinate where the shot landed */,
  "y" REAL /* y-coordinate where the shot landed */,
  "club_type" TEXT /* Type of club used for the shot */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance the ball traveled */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the shot */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the ball at impact */,
  "spin_rate" REAL /* Spin rate of the ball */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the shot */,
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hole where the shot was taken */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course where the shot was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_scan_number FOREIGN KEY ("scan_number") REFERENCES shot_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("hole_id") REFERENCES holes ("hole_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "golfers" (
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golfer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the golfer */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Handicap of the golfer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the golfer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the golfer */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the golfer */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the golfer joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("golfer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the course */,
  "holes" INTEGER /* Number of holes on the course */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the golf course */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the course is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the course is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the course */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the course */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the course */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the course */,
  "layout_image" TEXT /* URL to the layout image of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holes" (
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hole */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the hole belongs to */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number of the hole */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the hole */,
  "yardage" INTEGER /* Yardage of the hole */,
  "tee_boxes" TEXT /* Description of the tee boxes available on the hole */,
  "green_size" REAL /* Size of the green in square feet */,
  "fairway_width" REAL /* Width of the fairway in yards */,
  "bunkers" INTEGER /* Number of bunkers on the hole */,
  "water_hazards" INTEGER /* Number of water hazards on the hole */,
  "layout_image" TEXT /* URL to the layout image of the hole */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hole_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the instructor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the instructor */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the instructor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in teaching golf */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student profile */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the profile */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer the profile belongs to */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Specific goals and objectives set for the golfer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the student */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the student joined the system */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the student's progress and areas for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training plan */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the plan */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer the plan belongs to */,
  "plan" TEXT /* Specific training plan and exercises */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training plan */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the training sessions */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot record */,
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shot */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golfer who made the shot */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the shot was made */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the shot was made */,
  "hole_number" INTEGER /* Number of the hole where the shot was taken */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course where the shot was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)
